description: A pilot has reported an intermittent fault with the autopilot system. An avionics technician must diagnose the cause.

nodes.task_description: Download the fault codes from the aircraft's central maintenance computer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the fault codes related to the autopilot system.

nodes.task_description: Use the fault isolation manual (FIM) to trace the fault code to a probable cause, such as a faulty sensor or wiring.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent follows the FIM and narrows down the cause to a specific line-replaceable unit (LRU).

nodes.task_description: Replace the suspected faulty LRU and perform a system test to verify the fault is cleared.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent replaces the component and confirms the autopilot system now passes all tests.
